articles.title: WireGuard VPN developer can’t ship software updates after Microsoft locks account
articles.summary: The popular open source VPN maker is the second high-profile developer to say Microsoft locked his account without notifying him and is blocking their ability to send software updates to users.

articles.title: A self-driving car in Texas hit and killed a mother duck, sparking neighborhood outrage
articles.summary: An Avride autonomous vehicle near Austin hit the duck, facing backlash from the community. "It didn't slow down or hesitate at all, just steamrolled right through," according to a witness.

articles.title: Poke makes using AI agents as easy as sending a text
articles.summary: Poke brings AI agents to everyday users via text message by handling tasks and automations without complex setup, apps, or technical know-how.

articles.title: Canva doubles down on AI and marketing automation with Simtheory, Ortto acquisitions
articles.summary: Canva says the acquisitions add strengths in agentic AI, data infrastructure, marketing automation, and customer engagement.

articles.title: AWS boss explains why investing billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI is an OK conflict
articles.summary: AWS has an ingrained culture of handling competition, he explained, because the cloud giant also competes with its partners.

articles.title: Amazon to end support for older Kindle devices
articles.summary: Amazon told Kindle owners this week that it's ending support for all e-readers released in 2012 or earlier, making them virtually unable to load any new content.

articles.title: Meta debuts the Muse Spark model in a ‘ground-up overhaul’ of its AI
